title: Segment
description: A portion of a rail journey operated continuously by a single carrier between two consecutive stops or stations.

carrierCode.description: Code of the carrier operating this segment

segmentNumber.description: Sequence number of this segment within the journey

trainNumber.description: Train or service number for this segment

mode.description: Transport mode for this leg (e.g. BUS, RAIL, WALK, BICYCLE)

startTime.description: Scheduled or actual start time of the leg

endTime.description: Scheduled or actual end time of the leg

distance.description: Distance of this leg in metres

headsign.description: Destination sign text displayed on the vehicle

routeRef.description: Reference to the route served on this leg
